universal_credit_work_rules.taper_description: For every £1 earned above the work allowance, UC payment is reduced by 55p.

monthly_work_allowances.eligibility: SEN parents qualify as they are responsible for a child.

childcare_costs.note: Paid upfront by claimant and then reclaimed through UC.

carers_allowance_work_rules.cliff_edge_description: Earnings of £204.01 result in 100% loss of the £86.45 weekly benefit.

work_expenses: Equipment needed for work (e.g. specialist clothing)
Travel between different workplaces (not commute to one place)

care_costs.description: Cost of a carer to look after the disabled person or children while working.
care_costs.limit: Up to 50% of net earnings (after other deductions).
care_costs.restriction: Carer cannot be a close relative (spouse, partner, parent, child, sibling).

dla_for_children.review_risk: Work activity that contradicts the level of disability reported (e.g. physical work when claiming high mobility) may be used as evidence during periodic reviews.

pip.review_risk: Similar to DLA, the ability to work is not an automatic bar, but the functional tasks performed at work are relevant to the assessment.
